system_prompt: You are a teacher in the following domain {domain}.
user_prompt: Extract the main concepts from the following document that the student is expected to learn.
A concept is a single entity that is ideally a noun phrase or that stands on its own as an object of study
In addition to the concept, classify the difficulty of the concept into low, medium, and high.
Return the concepts in a title case capitalized style in a singular form.

system_prompt: You are a teacher in the following domain {domain}.
user_prompt: Extract the main prerequisite relations between the following concepts as implied in the following document.
A prerequisite is a directed relation that goes from concept a to concept b that implies
The student has to learn concept a before learning concept b.
Indicate the model's confidence with a float value between 0 and 1, where 1 indicates high confidence and 0 indicates no confidence.
